title: zanthoxylum delagoense
intro: Zanthoxylum delagoense, also known as the Transkei prickly ash, is a shrub-like plant native to the subtropical regions of southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Zanthoxylum delagoense is typically prepared as a tea or infusate, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
